concerns.detail: Removal of a substantive defense of advisor 'zhiyang' that cited specific high-quality papers (SIGGRAPH 2023 best paper, etc.) to counter criticism about research quality. This deletion suppresses legitimate counter-observations about the advisor's advising/research practices rather than cleaning up typos or off-topic content.
concerns.excerpt: 认识的人来说句公道话，别光盯着篇数据集 paper 喷，zhiyang idea 数量和质量都很强的。比如这篇 SIGGRAPH 2023 best paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2304.11605 是他的 idea，还有这个：https://arxiv.org/pdf/2110.00965
